title: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
description: Creamy mashed avocado on crunchy sourdough topped with a perfectly poached egg and red pepper flakes.

steps.instruction: Toast the sourdough slices until golden and crispy.
Halve the avocado, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a bowl. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper, then mash to your desired consistency.
Bring a small saucepan of water to a gentle simmer. Add white vinegar.
Crack each egg into a small cup. Create a gentle swirl in the water and slide the egg in. Poach for 3–4 minutes for a runny yolk.
Spread the mashed avocado onto the toasted bread.
Remove the poached egg with a slotted spoon, pat dry, and place on top of the avocado toast. Season with red pepper flakes and everything bagel seasoning.
